label: Coaching / Personal Brand
description: Blend encouragement with structure so the episode feels personal, motivating, and easy to act on.
bestFor: Coaches, consultants, and creator-led personal brand podcasts.
promptHint: Sound warm and motivating, but keep the advice structured enough that listeners know exactly what to do next.
exampleTitle: The Mindset Reset That Makes Your Next Episode Easier to Record
exampleDescription: Start with a relatable coaching insight, bring structure quickly, and close with one action the listener can do today.
